sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_reduce (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT arrayReduceInRanges('sum', [(1, 3), (3, 2)], values) AS res FROM test_array_reduce WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_array_reduce SET values = [100, 200, 300] WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayReduceInRanges('avg', [(1, 5)], values) AS avg_res FROM test_array_reduce;
